main.description: Return the subject's currently-active strike state. Loads the full subject_actions history for the DID and runs the v1.4 decay calculator (#50) over it; the cache table (subject_strike_state) is intentionally bypassed so the response is always derived from the source of truth. Mod or Admin role.

errors.name: SubjectNotFound
errors.description: No subject_actions row has ever been recorded for the given subject DID.
